regions.us-ports: Today, Miami faces clear skies with less than 10% rain probability and SE 6kt winds, supporting smooth port operations. Over the next 48 hours and beyond, Miami can expect overcast conditions with winds shifting from SE 10kt to ESE 11kt, and rain probabilities increasing to 22% by Day 3, potentially affecting shore excursions.
